privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.dataCollectionBody: We collect the information you provide when you create an account, complete your profile, or contact support. This may include your name, username, email, and profile details. We also collect technical data such as device identifiers, IP address, browser type, and usage logs to keep the service stable and secure.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how the platform is used. Some cookies are essential for security and core functionality, while others help us measure performance and improve the experience.
privacy.securityBody: We apply administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect your data. Access is limited to authorized personnel, and we monitor for suspicious activity. You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure and notifying us about any unauthorized access.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: These terms govern your access to and use of the platform.
terms.userResponsibilitiesBody: You agree to provide accurate information, respect other users, and comply with applicable laws. You are responsible for the content you post and for keeping your account credentials confidential.
terms.prohibitedActivitiesBody: You may not use the platform for illegal activity, harassment, spam, malware distribution, or unauthorized access. Attempts to disrupt the service, scrape data, or bypass security measures are prohibited.
terms.terminationBody: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, applicable laws, or our community guidelines. You may delete your account at any time. In serious cases, access may be restricted without prior notice.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Learn how cookies help us deliver essential functionality and improve your experience.
cookies.typesBody: We use essential cookies for authentication and security, and functional cookies to remember your settings. These cookies are required for core features such as login, session management, and language preferences.
cookies.analyticsBody: Analytics cookies help us understand usage patterns and improve performance. We use aggregated metrics to evaluate features, troubleshoot issues, and optimize the user experience.
cookies.preferencesBody: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings and, where available, platform cookie controls. Disabling certain cookies may affect functionality such as staying signed in or saving preferences.

hero.title: LUME — where your signals resonate
hero.subtitle: Feed, messages, servers, and search in one fast interface. Control privacy and stay connected.

profile.title: Profile

verification.title: Verification

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Answers to common questions about the platform.

section1.title: Account & Access
section1.content: Registration takes only a few minutes: provide email, create a password, and confirm details. If access is lost, use recovery and review active sessions. For security, keep a strong password and avoid sharing it.

section2.title: Feed & Posts
section2.content: The feed offers recommended and following views. Publish signals, attach images, and pin important posts on your profile. Comments and resonance help your content reach more people.

section3.title: Messages & Moments
section3.content: Chats support attachments, replies, and ephemeral moments. A moment opens once and is then marked as viewed. If uploads fail, check connectivity and file size limits.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Core principles for behavior and content on the platform.

section1.title: Respect & Safety
section1.content: No threats, harassment, discrimination, doxxing, or sharing personal data without consent. Maintain a respectful tone and report violations when necessary.

section2.title: Content & Links
section2.content: Illegal content, spam, and malicious files are prohibited. Links must be safe and relevant. Adult content must follow platform rules and age restrictions.

section3.title: Servers & Moderation
section3.content: Server owners define community rules. Moderators should act transparently, document decisions, and respond to reports within a reasonable timeframe.

section1.title: How to reach us
section1.content: Describe the issue clearly: what happened, when, and which actions triggered it. Include your username, device, and browser/app version. Screenshots and logs speed up resolution.

section2.title: Processing stages
section2.content: Requests move through: received → in progress → needs info → resolved. We may ask for clarification. Timelines vary by complexity and load.

section3.title: Account security
section3.content: If you suspect compromise, change your password, end active sessions, and review linked devices. Report the suspected time window to support.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Official contacts for the platform team.

section1.title: General inquiries
section1.content: Use the official contact channel for general requests and include a clear subject. Replies are handled by priority and queue.

section2.title: Partnerships
section2.content: Share goals, audience, and expected format to help us evaluate partnership proposals quickly.

section3.title: Press
section3.content: For media requests, include outlet, format, deadlines, and the desired comment. We can provide official statements or assets.

quick.title: Quick actions
quick.description: Find the right section or contact us directly.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions.
faq.empty: No matches found. Try another query.

q1.title: How do I change my email?
q1.answer: Update your email in profile settings. You’ll need to confirm the new address.

q2.title: I forgot my password. What should I do?
q2.answer: Use password reset and follow the email instructions.
q2.bullet3: All sessions will end after reset

q4.title: How do I delete my account?
q4.answer: Account deletion is available in settings and is irreversible.

q5.title: Where can I see active devices?
q5.answer: Active sessions are listed in the security section.

q1.title: How does the recommendation feed work?
q1.answer: Recommendations are based on reactions and follows.

q2.title: Why is my post not visible?
q2.answer: Check privacy settings and any content restrictions.
q2.bullet1: Post may be hidden by moderation

q3.title: How do I pin a post?
q3.answer: Open the post menu and choose “Pin”.

q4.title: How do I delete a post?
q4.answer: Delete is available in the post menu.

q5.title: Why isn’t my feed updating?
q5.answer: Try refreshing or check your connection.

q1.title: How do I send an expiring photo?
q1.answer: In chat, enable Moment mode and add an image.

q2.title: How do I delete a message?
q2.answer: Long-press and delete for yourself or everyone.
q2.bullet3: Media is removed with the message

q3.title: Are files supported?
q3.answer: Yes, you can send images and documents.

q4.title: Why aren’t messages delivered?
q4.answer: Check your connection and service status.

q5.title: How do I reply to a message?
q5.answer: Long-press a message and choose Reply.

q1.title: How do I create a server?

q2.title: How do I configure a server?
q2.answer: Server settings are available to owners.

q3.title: How do I manage channels?
q3.answer: Add or remove channels in the server sidebar.

q4.title: Why was my request declined?
q4.answer: Reason is set by server owner.

q5.title: How do I leave a server?
q5.answer: Click “Leave” in the server footer block.

q1.title: Who can see my posts?
q1.answer: Privacy is managed in profile settings.

q2.title: How do I hide personal data?
q2.answer: Keep profile minimal and review links.

q4.title: How do I delete my data?

q5.title: Who sees my activity?
q5.answer: Activity is visible to followers and server members.
